topic: Comprehensive curated knowledge base on large language models, capabilities, research, and real-world applications

entries.q: What is the name of the first-generation reasoning model from DeepSeek?
Which paper introduced the concept of Transformers in 2017?
What is the name of the open-sourced GPT-4o level model from DeepSeek?
Which model is known for being a MoE language model with 32B active and 1T total parameters?
What is the name of the paper that introduced BERT in 2018?
entries.a: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

entries.q: Which paper introduced the concept of Switch Transformers in 2021?
entries.a: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

entries.q: What is the name of the model that was introduced in the paper 'Improving language models by retrieving from trillions of tokens' in 2021?
Which model is known for being a few-shot learner, as described in the paper 'Language models are few-shot learners' in 2020?
